---
title: "Experience"
pagetitle: "Experience — Quan (Kyle) Zhang"
---

Before returning to academia, I spent several years in industry in program and
product management and data-driven operations — cloud data-warehousing, supply
chain, and analytics. That work grounds the engineering and data-science side of
my current research.

## Industry

::: {.exp}
### Program Manager — Microsoft
[SQL Server Data Warehousing / Analytics Platform System (APS) · Redmond, WA · 2014–2015]{.exp-meta}
Owned a \$4M delivery pipeline of cloud data-warehouse appliances to enterprise data
centers nationwide and built the logistics and cost model for Parallel Data Warehouse
infrastructure, coordinating across engineering, OEM, and customer teams.
:::

::: {.exp}
### Project Management Specialist — Quanta Computer (Amazon AWS NPI)
[Bellevue, WA · 2013–2014]{.exp-meta}
Coordinated New Product Introduction releases for Amazon AWS cloud servers across a
North America–Asia supply chain (contributing to 66% year-over-year sales growth);
managed bill-of-materials and component provisioning.
:::

## Earlier roles

::: {.exp}
### Project Engineer (Co-op) — Caterpillar Inc.
[Manufacturing Strategy · Aurora, IL · 2012]{.exp-meta}
Built NPV-based analyses projecting ~\$1M/year in savings across warehouse-relocation
scenarios; cut urgent-order tardiness by 60% using Six Sigma DMAIC.
:::

::: {.exp}
### Research Assistant (Co-op) — Argonne National Laboratory
[Transportation Research & Analysis Computing Center (TRACC) · Lemont, IL · 2011]{.exp-meta}
Regression and simulation modeling of urban evacuation timing for Chicago, in
collaboration with NASA; design of experiments and statistical modeling.
:::

## Certifications

- Google Business Intelligence Professional
- Google Data Analytics Professional
- Six Sigma DMAIC Green Belt
